intro.name: Lucas Pereira.
intro.description: Full-stack developer who likes building things that work well and make sense for the people using them.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I got into programming because I fell in love with the process of building things from scratch and seeing them come to life. I have a degree in Systems Analysis and Development, and over time I naturally gravitated toward Full-Stack — I enjoy both crafting interfaces and solving the problems that live underneath them.
about.p2: Throughout my career I've worked with Java, Vue.js, Python, React.js, Shopify, and Webflow, always paying close attention to user experience, performance, and integrations that actually need to work. I like learning new things and I'm always looking for better ways to do what I already do.

capi.name: Capí
capi.description: An AI chatbot backed by the Google News Initiative, built to process and interpret climate data from trusted sources like the IPCC, delivering precise insights to combat climate disinformation in Brazil.

ignite.name: Ignite Lab-React
ignite.description: Application developed during Rocketseat's Ignite Lab event. Its main functionality is to present and structure the lessons shared by the platform's teachers for students.

matanativa.name: Mata Nativa
matanativa.description: A digital experimentation laboratory dedicated to impactful sponsored content, combining engaging narratives, design, and data science to communicate scientific stories and drive positive change for Brazilian biomes.

pokesearch.name: PokeSearch V2
pokesearch.description: The application is the second version of the PokeSearch project, where the goal is for users to access all existing Pokémon, information about each one, and the most diverse information about Pokémon.

bougie.name: Bougie Bottle
bougie.description: Creation and improvement of various features to enhance the overall user experience and bring the best of the brand and the best visual appearance to their store.

aila.name: Aila
aila.description: Aila, a nail polish brand, is a brand with the purpose of incorporating a softer and cleaner design to reflect the delicacy of its products.

diamond.name: Diamond Matress
diamond.description: Diamond Mattress offers an extensive collection of exquisite mattresses and bedding, combining cutting-edge technology with timeless design for unparalleled comfort.

rocketq.name: Forum - Rocket.q
rocketq.description: Application designed for making comments on a forum posted by the user

cypris.name: Cypris AI
cypris.description: An AI platform designed to unify global innovation data and internal knowledge, enabling R&D and IP teams to cut research time, make stronger decisions, and move faster with compounded intelligence.

alliance.name: Alliance Solution
alliance.description: A technology partner specialized in construction and real estate software, providing certified Sage solutions and dedicated support to improve visibility, reduce risk, and scale with confidence.

brighton.name: Build With Brighton
brighton.description: A locally owned homebuilder trusted along Utah's Wasatch Front, offering thoughtfully designed communities and quick move-in options, backed by a management team with over 100 years of combined experience.
